allow: PowerShell($css = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Diego Ovando\\Source\\games\\rol,attack\\pruebas\\6.1\\styles-m3.css" -Raw; $open = \($css.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '{' }\).Count; $close = \($css.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '}' }\).Count; "Open: $open  Close: $close  Match: $\($open -eq $close\)")
